description: Card in square format. A blue header bar carries the headline 'TdA ARREST' in large yellow and gold serif caps. The center is a blurred in-custody photo of a young man in a lime-green intake top, beside an officer in dark blue with his back turned, in an institutional corridor. Overlaid at left in bold white sans-serif is the name across four lines: 'Elvis Duglas Duarn-Suniaga.' A red banner across the lower center lists charges in white caps: 'FUGITIVE, RECEIVING STOLEN PROPERTY, ASSAULT, FORCED ABDUCTION & DRUG POSSESSION.' A bottom blue footer bar shows the circular DHS seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' (white) at left and 'Tren de Aragua' in gold serif at right.
notable_text: TdA ARREST; Elvis Duglas Duarn-Suniaga; FUGITIVE, RECEIVING STOLEN PROPERTY, ASSAULT, FORCED ABDUCTION & DRUG POSSESSION; Tren de Aragua
